creator: ormandj@gmail.com
text:
This solved my problem! I hope the xorg developers will get it added into
the next release so auto-detection works as expected. :) (I've seen various
reports in various forums about the same type of issue.) Thank you for your
help, Igor.

Cheers,
David

On Jan 15, 2008 7:51 PM, Igor Mozolevsky <igor@hybrid-lab.co.uk> wrote:

> Try Option      "CPPIOMode" "yes"
>
> in Section "Device"
>
>
> Possibly related PR: https://bugs.freedesktop.org/show_bug.cgi?id=11870
>
